summary: All ~219 Tailwind default palette violations replaced with theme tokens across all 10 consumer apps. Build passes.

findings.description: ~219 Tailwind default palette classes (amber-400, green-500, pink-400, etc.) across all 10 consumer apps replaced with project theme tokens (accent, green, pill-*, etc.)
proper-wine-pour gradient had hardcoded #7f1d1d and rgba(255,255,255,0.8) — replaced with oklch-based expressions
themeColor metadata values in layout.tsx files use hex — acceptable since browser meta theme-color API requires literal color values
Canvas API colors (#ffffff, #000000) in cringe-rizzler meme generator are acceptable — Canvas 2D context requires literal color strings
